hero.subheadline: Four specialized AI agents — Researcher, Psychologist, Strategist and Copywriter — work in parallel to craft psychologically calibrated emails that don't sound like they came from a template.

features.label: The Specialists
features.title: Not one model.
features.description: Each agent is great at exactly one thing. Together they replace your team — and more.

researcher.name: The Researcher
researcher.description: Scans LinkedIn, news, podcasts and press to surface the precise intel you need — right-moment context that makes your email land.

psychologist.name: The Psychologist
psychologist.description: Builds a Big Five OCEAN profile — your Digital Twin. Public signals become a map of how they think, feel, and decide.

strategist.name: The Strategist
strategist.description: Plans the email angle, hook, tone, and sequence. Knows what to say, in what order, and why it will work.

copywriter.name: The Copywriter
copywriter.description: Writes the actual email — personalized, calibrated, and human. Not a template. A message crafted for one person.

demo.label: How It Works
demo.title: One command.
demo.description: From prospect name to calibrated email in under 90 seconds.

differentiation.label: The Difference
differentiation.description: Most email tools blast the same template to hundreds of people. MailMind builds a psychological profile of each prospect — their motivations, communication style, and decision-making patterns — then crafts an email calibrated specifically for them.
items: Big Five OCEAN profile built from public signals
Personality-matched tone, hook, and angle for every email
Sandbox simulation predicts prospect reaction before you send

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent
pricing.description: Start free, upgrade when you need more. Cancel anytime.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about MailMind.
faq.q1: How is this different from ChatGPT or a template?
faq.a1: MailMind uses 4 specialized agents that research your prospect in real-time, build a psychological profile, and write a custom email — not a template filled with variables.
faq.q2: What is the OCEAN profile all about?
faq.a2: OCEAN (Big Five) is the gold standard personality model used in psychology research. Our Psychologist agent builds a Digital Twin from public signals to predict how your prospect thinks, feels, and decides.
faq.a3: No — MailMind writes and optimizes your email. You send it through your existing email client or connect your CRM.
faq.a4: We include a Sandbox simulation that predicts prospect reaction and a SpamGuard check before you send anything.
faq.a5: Yes. All prospect data is processed ephemerally and never stored or used for model training. We are SOC 2 compliant.
faq.q6: How fast will I get results?
faq.a6: Most users see a complete, ready-to-send email in under 90 seconds from entering a prospect name.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about plans and billing.
faq.q1: Can I switch plans at any time?
faq.a1: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. When upgrading, you get immediate access to your new features. When downgrading, changes apply at the end of your billing cycle.
faq.a2: The Free plan is available forever with no credit card required. Upgrade to Starter or Professional when you're ready for more power.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and PayPal. All payments are processed securely through Stripe or Polar.sh.
faq.a4: Absolutely. You can cancel anytime from your account settings. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period — no questions asked.
faq.q5: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faq.a5: Your data is preserved for 30 days after cancellation. If you reactivate within that period, everything is restored. After 30 days, data is permanently deleted.
faq.q6: Do you offer custom plans for teams?
faq.a6: Yes — we offer custom enterprise plans with dedicated support, custom onboarding, and volume discounts. Contact us for details.

onboarding.aurelius_welcome_1: Bun venit în MailMind! 👋 Sunt Aurelius, asistentul tău AI. O să te ghidez pas cu pas prin configurarea contului tău. Hai să ne cunoaștem!
onboarding.aurelius_welcome_2: Îți voi pune câteva întrebări despre brandul tău, apoi îți voi prezenta tool-urile puternice pe care le ai la dispoziție. Totul durează cam 2-3 minute.
onboarding.aurelius_welcome_3: Sunt aici să te ajut — dacă ai întrebări pe parcurs, nu ezita să le pui. Acum, să începem!
onboarding.aurelius_brand: Pentru început, spune-mi despre brandul tău. Cum te numești și în ce industrie activezi? Astea mă ajută să înțeleg contextul în care vei lucra.
onboarding.audience_placeholder: Ex: Fondatori de startup-uri tech, Directori de vânzări în enterprise
onboarding.audience_hint: Sfat: "CMO-uri în companii B2B cu 50-500 angajați" e mai util decât "toată lumea"
onboarding.aurelius_audience: Acum, spune-mi cui te adresezi. Cu cât îmi dai mai multe detalii despre publicul tău țintă, cu atât mai bine voi putea personaliza mesajele. Gândește-te la clientul tău ideal.
onboarding.voice_placeholder: Ex: Profesional dar prietenos, Autoritar, Cald și empatic
onboarding.aurelius_voice: Cum sună brandul tău? Tonul vocii este esențial — el definește personalitatea comunicării tale. Poți alege un ton existent sau poți combina. De exemplu: profesional dar prietenos.
onboarding.aurelius_values: Valorile brandului sunt principiile care îți ghidează comunicarea. Ele vor influența modul în care Swarm-ul meu abordează fiecare campanie. Alege cel puțin una — câte vrei!
onboarding.aurelius_pain: Ultimele întrebări despre brand! Cu ce provocări te confrunți în email-urile tale? Selectează-le pe cele care rezonează cu tine — mă vor ajuta să prioritizez soluțiile potrivite.
onboarding.aurelius_tools_1: Perfect! Am reținut totul despre brandul tău. Acum, hai să-ți arăt ce poate face MailMind pentru tine. Fiecare tool e gândit să transforme modul în care scrii emailuri.
onboarding.aurelius_tools_2: Apasă pe fiecare tool pentru detalii — sunt create să lucreze împreună ca un sistem integrat.
onboarding.click_to_minimize: Apasă din nou pe card pentru a-l minimiza
onboarding.aurelius_final_1: Atingeri finale! Alege-ți avatarul și adaugă orice context suplimentar dorești. Apoi voi activa totul și vei fi gata să începi.
onboarding.aurelius_final_2: După finalizare, vei fi redirecționat în Dashboard, unde mă poți găsi oricând în colțul din dreapta jos. 💬
onboarding.context_placeholder: Misiune, slogan, sau orice altceva ce vrei să știm...
onboarding.toast_values: Selectează cel puțin o valoare de brand.
onboarding.toast_success: Totul e configurat! Bine ai venit în MailMind.

tool_descriptions.swarm: Four specialized agents (Researcher, Psychologist, Strategist, Copywriter) collaborate autonomously to create hyper-personalized emails. Each agent has a specialized role, and Consensus validates the final result.
tool_descriptions.digital-twin: A psychological model of the prospect based on the Big Five (OCEAN) model. Scores for Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism guide the tone and angle of the message.
tool_descriptions.vault: Store briefs, references, images and documents directly in the cloud (R2). Everything you upload becomes context for the Swarm, resulting in more informed and coherent campaigns.
tool_descriptions.war-room: Monitor swarms in real-time, see agent progress, approve strategies and adjust parameters. Everything from one place, with tabs for Twin, Chat, Tools and API.

war-room: Special tools: A/B Test, Sequence Builder
